import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'backend'\)
from knowledge_base import KNOWLEDGE_BASE, search_knowledge_base
from database import init_db, DB_PATH
from agents.hr_agent import get_hr_agent
from agents.user_agent import get_user_agent, USER_PROFILES
from agents.judge_agent import get_judge_agent
from simulation_runner import SimulationRunner
init_db\(\)
print\('DB path:', DB_PATH\)
print\('Knowledge base topics:', list\(KNOWLEDGE_BASE.keys\(\)\)\)
print\('User profiles:', list\(USER_PROFILES.keys\(\)\)\)
result = search_knowledge_base\('direct deposit setup'\)
print\('KB search result \(first 80 chars\):', result[:80]\)
print\('All imports OK'\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from backend.database import get_connection

ids = ['ac08917e-69f0-4b26-a7e5-65bbb322efac', '652032d8-3f23-489b-bbcc-ea32b17be7a5', '1c8b5846-ff29-47fc-9553-2736834f44ae', '5a2f0e5a']

with get_connection\(\) as conn:
    for sid in ids:
        conn.execute\('DELETE FROM evaluations WHERE session_id LIKE ?', \(sid + '%',\)\)
        conn.execute\('DELETE FROM turns WHERE session_id LIKE ?', \(sid + '%',\)\)
        conn.execute\('DELETE FROM sessions WHERE session_id LIKE ?', \(sid + '%',\)\)
    remaining = conn.execute\('SELECT session_id, user_profile, total_score FROM sessions'\).fetchall\(\)

print\('Remaining sessions:'\)
for r in remaining:
    print\(f'  {r[0]} | {r[1]} | {r[2]}/40'\)
")

Bash(/Users/humzac/AgentSimLabHR/.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import sys, sqlite3; sys.path.insert\(0, 'backend'\)
db = '/Users/humzac/AgentSimLabHR/data/agents/2a21dd2d-eeaa-4e4b-aec2-39a0e30094bc.db'
from database import init_db
init_db\(db_path=db\)

conn = sqlite3.connect\(db\)
conn.execute\('PRAGMA foreign_keys = OFF'\)
conn.execute\('DELETE FROM evaluations'\)
conn.execute\('DELETE FROM turns'\)
conn.execute\('DELETE FROM sessions'\)
conn.execute\('''UPDATE batches SET
    session_count = 0,
    avg_total_score = NULL,
    goal_achievement_rate = NULL,
    avg_goal_achievement = NULL,
    avg_response_quality = NULL,
    avg_handling = NULL,
    avg_staying_in_scope = NULL'''\)
conn.commit\(\)
print\('sessions:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM sessions'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('turns:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM turns'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('evaluations:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM evaluations'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('batches:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM batches'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('prompt_versions:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM prompt_versions'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('personas:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM personas'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('documents:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM documents'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
conn.close\(\)
print\('Done.'\)
")

Bash(/Users/humzac/AgentSimLabHR/.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import sys, sqlite3; sys.path.insert\(0, 'backend'\)
db = '/Users/humzac/AgentSimLabHR/data/agents/2a21dd2d-eeaa-4e4b-aec2-39a0e30094bc.db'
conn = sqlite3.connect\(db\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
rows = conn.execute\('SELECT version_id, version_number, is_active, change_summary, created_at FROM prompt_versions ORDER BY version_number'\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    print\(dict\(r\)\)
print\(\)
rows2 = conn.execute\('SELECT batch_id, prompt_version_id, ran_at, session_count, optimizer_accepted, in_optimizer_run FROM batches ORDER BY ran_at'\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows2:
    print\(dict\(r\)\)
conn.close\(\)
")
